title: leontodon ovinus
intro: Leontodon ovinus, also known as sheep's sorrel or yellow hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, Leontodon ovinus has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, potassium, and other essential minerals, providing various health benefits such as antioxidant properties, anti-inflammatory effects, and immune system support. Leontodon ovinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal purposes, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
